tools.name: list_products
tools.description: Browse the catalog with tag, brand, near_hex (ΔE shade match), hue_family, and sort filters. Bearer becomes required when passing `phone` (rewards projection).

tools.name: list_brands
tools.description: Return every brand with product counts and slugs. Bearer required.

tools.name: validate_gift_card
tools.description: Check a gift card's remaining balance using its code. Public endpoint — no bearer required (gated on knowledge of the code).

tools.name: get_customer
tools.description: Return tags, ℳ-credit balance, M Club tier for the customer with the given E.164 phone. Bearer required.

tools.name: get_cart
tools.description: Return the customer's most-recently-updated cart with per-line and total reward projection. Bearer + phone required.

tools.name: list_orders
tools.description: Recent orders with 6-axis status (order / payment / fulfillment / delivery / return / review). Bearer + phone required.

tools.name: list_payment_links
tools.description: Pending payment_requests on the customer's unpaid orders. Bearer + phone required.

tools.name: get_customer_best_deals
tools.description: Top deal projections based on the customer's tags + M Club tier. Bearer + phone required.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "list_products" references sensitive artifacts (bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Browse the catalog with tag, brand, near_hex (ΔE shade match), hue_family, and sort filters. Bearer becomes required when passing `phone` (rewards projection).
